sub_groupings.name: Lactation Disorders

sub_groupings.description: Injuries and foreign objects affecting reproductive and urinary systems

sub_groupings.description: Malignant growths in reproductive and urinary system tissues

sub_groupings.name: Other Reproductive & Breast Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Miscellaneous reproductive and breast conditions not fitting other categories
